title: Legacy console edition small world type
body:
Tiny World Biomes, Nothin more Nothin less

if You've seen the Legacy Console Edition "Small World" type This is very similer to What you get from that to some extent

If you wanna get a better idea of what you're getting yourself into, just take a look at the Photos in Gallery

Either way, Everything else is still the same, its litterally just Tiny biomes, And Also more Eroded Terrain, considering all it does is Take the 4 Main Noise files that are used for the Biome Size and placement, and makes them use a Smaller Number
